top_signals.title: Former imperial family member views Japan’s adoption plan as ‘unrealistic’
top_signals.summary: The 81-year-old cousin of Emperor Emeritus Akihito said he believes no one should be "forced" to be adopted and that he hopes the system will "respect the wishes of individuals."
